creator: stefan@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi Giacomo,

the patch files/fvwm-crystal.apps.diff doesn't look correct - see the
build error below. Can you please investigate and send an updated patch?

Regards,
Stefan

====================<phase 3: make patch>====================
add_pkg
===>  Patching for fvwm-crystal-3.0.6_4
===>  Applying extra patch /a/ports/x11-wm/fvwm-crystal/files/extra-patch-Makefile
patch ./work/fvwm-crystal-3.0.6/bin/fvwm-crystal.apps < files/fvwm-crystal.apps.diff
Hmm...  Looks like a unified diff to me...
The text leading up to this was:
--------------------------
|--- fvwm-crystal.apps_old      2008-06-23 23:42:54.000000000 +0300
|+++ fvwm-crystal.apps_new      2010-03-22 14:07:57.000000000 +0200
--------------------------
patch: **** can't find ./work/fvwm-crystal-3.0.6/bin/fvwm-crystal.apps
*** Error code 1
